'''thotayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:pubigerous|pubigerous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pubigerous|pubigerous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thotayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotayithi|thotayithi]] || [[word:thotayiji|thotayiji]] || [[word:thotayishi|thotayishi]] || [[word:thotayiki|thotayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotayuthuthu|thotayuthuthu]] || [[word:thotayujuju|thotayujuju]] || [[word:thotayushushu|thotayushushu]] || [[word:thotayukuku|thotayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotayuthu|thotayuthu]] || [[word:thotayuju|thotayuju]] || [[word:thotayushu|thotayushu]] || [[word:thotayuku|thotayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotayufthuf|thotayufthuf]] || [[word:thotayufjuf|thotayufjuf]] || [[word:thotayufshuf|thotayufshuf]] || [[word:thotayufkuf|thotayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotayethe|thotayethe]] || [[word:thotayeje|thotayeje]] || [[word:thotayeshe|thotayeshe]] || [[word:thotayeke|thotayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotayothotho|thotayothotho]] || [[word:thotayojojo|thotayojojo]] || [[word:thotayoshosho|thotayoshosho]] || [[word:thotayokoko|thotayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotayotho|thotayotho]] || [[word:thotayojo|thotayojo]] || [[word:thotayosho|thotayosho]] || [[word:thotayoko|thotayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotayofthof|thotayofthof]] || [[word:thotayofjof|thotayofjof]] || [[word:thotayofshof|thotayofshof]] || [[word:thotayofkof|thotayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotayïfthïf|thotayïfthïf]] || [[word:thotayïfjïf|thotayïfjïf]] || [[word:thotayïfshïf|thotayïfshïf]] || [[word:thotayïfkïf|thotayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotayïfthïfthïf|thotayïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thotayïfjïfjïf|thotayïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thotayïfshïfshïf|thotayïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thotayïfkïfkïf|thotayïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotayïfthïf|thotayïfthïf]] || [[word:thotayïfjïf|thotayïfjïf]] || [[word:thotayïfshïf|thotayïfshïf]] || [[word:thotayïfkïf|thotayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotayïfthïf|thotayïfthïf]] || [[word:thotayïfjïf|thotayïfjïf]] || [[word:thotayïfshïf|thotayïfshïf]] || [[word:thotayïfkïf|thotayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotayæthæ|thotayæthæ]] || [[word:thotayæjæ|thotayæjæ]] || [[word:thotayæshæ|thotayæshæ]] || [[word:thotayækæ|thotayækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotayathatha|thotayathatha]] || [[word:thotayajaja|thotayajaja]] || [[word:thotayashasha|thotayashasha]] || [[word:thotayakaka|thotayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotayatha|thotayatha]] || [[word:thotayaja|thotayaja]] || [[word:thotayasha|thotayasha]] || [[word:thotayaka|thotayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotayafthaf|thotayafthaf]] || [[word:thotayafjaf|thotayafjaf]] || [[word:thotayafshaf|thotayafshaf]] || [[word:thotayafkaf|thotayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thotayasha|thotayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thotayshësha|thotayshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thotayrosha|thotayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thotaymusha|thotaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thotayasha|thotayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothotaynkshësha|gothotaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothotaynkrosha|gothotaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothotaynkmusha|gothotaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothotaynkyasha|gothotaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thotatayasha|thotatayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thotatayshësha|thotatayshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thotatayrosha|thotatayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thotataymusha|thotataymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thotatayasha|thotatayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothotataynkshësha|gothotataynkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothotataynkrosha|gothotataynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothotataynkmusha|gothotataynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothotataynkyasha|gothotataynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thetæyasha|thetæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thetæyshësha|thetæyshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thetæyrosha|thetæyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thetæymusha|thetæymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thetæyasha|thetæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothetæynkshësha|gothetæynkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothetæynkrosha|gothetæynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothetæynkmusha|gothetæynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothetæynkyasha|gothetæynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thotfayasha|thotfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thotfayshësha|thotfayshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thotfayrosha|thotfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thotfaymusha|thotfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thotfayasha|thotfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothotfaynkshësha|gothotfaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothotfaynkrosha|gothotfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothotfaynkmusha|gothotfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothotfaynkyasha|gothotfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
